docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE SUBMITTED AT WINDOW (REGARDING DEFENDANT'S MOTION/REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDAROS, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, LAYLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDAROS, MARK $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDAROS, MARK
